'''Mensix Mining Company''' was a subsidiary of [[Mensix Corp]]. The company owned at least one [[Magma/Legends|lava]] [[Mining/Legends|mining]] facility on [[Mustafar/Legends|Mustafar]], [[Mensix Mining Facility/Legends|Mining Facility AG3-T]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Trials of Obi-Wan]]'' {{1stm}}
